summary: Mono soundboard source praised as the best available and notably complete, though no musical details are given.
review: The reviewer rates this mono SBD recording four stars, highlighting its completeness and overall sound quality despite being in mono. No comments were made about the band's performance or specific songs, so the musical assessment remains neutral.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) focuses on recording completeness and sound quality; no information on performance, so rating reflects good recording but unknown show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mono mix but clear enough to be preferred among available SBDs; praised for being mostly complete.
